PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO THE FOLLOWING SETTLEMENT: (1) IRENE NAKANO TO PAY JAMES NORIEGA $1800.00, (2) DEFENDANT TO DISMISS CROSS-COMPLAINT, (3) CASE CONTINUED TO AUGUST 13, 2015 AT 3:30PM, IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS, CASE IS DISMISSED.
